hero.title: Explore Budva from the Sea
hero.subtitle: Speedboat tours for up to 7 people. Skipper, fuel & welcome drink included. Book in 2 minutes.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse our 4 packages and pick the one that fits your day.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Fill in the form with your date, time and contact details.
howItWorks.step3Desc: We'll confirm your booking. Pay cash at Budva Marina. All aboard!

destinations.title: Destinations
destinations.subtitle: Every tour includes stops at some of the most beautiful spots on the Montenegrin coast.

cta.title: Ready for an unforgettable day on the water?
cta.subtitle: Book your speedboat tour today. Skipper, fuel and welcome drink always included.

tours.title: Our Tours
tours.subtitle: Choose the perfect tour for your day on the water.
tours.allInclusive: Skipper · Fuel · Welcome Drink · Swimming Stops

availability.noSlots: No available time slots for this date.
